description:
Improve AgriTech Chat Assistant Intelligence and Data Integration

Transform the chat assistant at https://agritech-dashboard.thebzlab.online/chat from a generic responder into an intelligent, data-aware assistant that can effectively help users manage their agricultural operations.

Current Problems:
- Chat assistant cannot access any actual system data (farms, workforce, schedules)
- Responds with "No farm data available" even when farms exist in the system
- Cannot answer basic operational questions like "Who's working today?"
- Gives generic responses instead of actionable insights
- Fails to integrate with existing modules (workforce, farm management, production tracking)

Required Functionality:
- Connect chat assistant to all existing data modules (farms, workforce, crops, schedules, production)
- Enable real-time querying of operational data through natural language
- Provide contextual, data-driven responses based on actual system state
- Support common operational queries:
  * Worker schedules and availability
  * Farm and parcel listings with current status
  * Crop health and growth stage information
  * Task assignments and completion status
  * Production metrics and yield data
  * Equipment and resource availability

Intelligence Requirements:
- Understand user intent from casual queries (e.g., "who's working today" → query workforce schedule)
- Provide proactive insights based on current season, farm status, and pending tasks
- Offer actionable recommendations specific to user's actual farms and operations
- Reference actual data points (specific farm names, worker names, crop varieties)
- Handle follow-up questions with context awareness

Technical Implementation:
- Integrate chat backend with existing database and API endpoints
- Implement proper authentication and data scoping (show only user's organization data)
- Add RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) or function calling to query structured data
- Cache frequently accessed data to improve response time
- Add error handling for missing permissions or unavailable modules

Success Criteria:
- User can ask "list farms" and receive their actual farm inventory
- User can ask "who's working today" and receive current workforce schedule
- Chat provides specific, personalized recommendations based on actual farm conditions
- Response time under 3 seconds for data queries
- Assistant maintains context across conversation
- Zero "no data available" responses when data actually exists in system

Business Impact:
- This is a key differentiator for platform sales and demos
- Must showcase intelligent, data-driven agricultural assistance
- Should demonstrate clear value over manual module navigation
- Needs to work reliably in customer presentations
title: Integrate Chat Assistant with Farm Operations Data
